Subject: Urgent Action Required: Update Your Direct Deposit Information Dear Employee, We hope this message finds you well. This is a reminder from the HR and Payroll Department regarding an important update to your payroll information. During our recent system audit, it came to our attention that we require confirmation of your direct deposit banking details to ensure there are no disruptions to your next pay cycle. With the upcoming payroll deadline on Friday, it is crucial to verify and update your information by the end of the day today. To assist you in this process, please click the link below to access our secure employee portal and update your banking details immediately: [Update Direct Deposit Information] Failure to update your information by the specified date may result in delays in your salary deposit for this pay period. We understand the importance of timely payments, and we are committed to ensuring you receive your compensation without any issues. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact us at the HR Helpdesk. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Best regards, Jessica Allen HR and Payroll Department [Your Company Name]
